meta.title: Russia says it DESTROYED a NATO bunker with the Kinzhal?!
meta.description:
Did Russia actually manage to destroy a secret NATO command center hidden hundreds of meters below Ukraine using their hypersonic Kinzhal missile?

No. But Russian trolls pouring into the comment sections of social media platforms and news sites all over the web sure do want you to think that they did. 

Let’s dive into this increasingly popular disinformation narrative, where it originated from, and why we can conclusively say that it’s just another attempt at manipulating the narrative surrounding Russia’s fumbled invasion of Ukraine.
